from pyspark.sql.functions import when, col, lit, lower, trim
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

ALL_JOURNAL_URL = "https://jamanetwork.com/pages/new-issns"
silver_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/American Medical Association (AMA)/all/'

Year = 2025

# APC for OA Journa is 3000 USD. This needs to be validated. Pleae check below url for latest price
# https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/pages/for-authors
# APC for Hybrid journal is 5000 USD. This need to be validated. Please check the journal website for latest price

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36'
}
response = requests.get(ALL_JOURNAL_URL, headers=headers)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')
div_table = soup.find("div", {"class": "table"})

rows = div_table.find_all('div', class_='row')

# Extract data into a list of dictionaries
data = []
for row in rows:
    journal_full_title = row.find('div', {'data-label': 'Journal Full Title'}).text
    issn_print = row.find('div', {'data-label': 'ISSN (Print)'}).text
    issn_online = row.find('div', {'data-label': 'ISSN (Online)'}).text
    data.append({
        'Title': journal_full_title,
        'Print_ISSN': issn_print,
        'Online_ISSN': issn_online
    })

# Convert to PySpark DataFrame
df = spark.createDataFrame(data)

df = df.withColumn("Print_ISSN", when(col("Print_ISSN") == 'Online Only', lit("")).otherwise(col("Print_ISSN")))

# Show DataFrame
df.show(truncate=False)

new_df = df.select(
    lit("American Medical Association (AMA)").alias("Publisher"),
    col("Print_ISSN").alias("ISSN1"),
    col("Online_ISSN").alias("ISSN2"),
    col("Title").alias("Title"),
    lit("Publisher Website via Misc Publisher APCs list").alias("Source"),
    lit("Hybrid").alias("Model"),
    lit("").alias("Model Notes"), 
    lit("5000").alias("APC"),
    lit("USD").alias("Currency"),
    lit("CC BY, CC BY-NC-ND").alias("License Types"),
    lit(Year).alias("Year"),
    lit("").alias("JoiningID"),
    lit("").alias("PublisherID"),
    lit("").alias("Publisher URL"),
    lit("").alias("Imprint"),
    lit("American Medical Association (AMA)").alias("Society")
)

# Not a good idea, please check this before running
new_df = new_df.withColumn("Model", when(lower(col("Title")).contains("open"), lit("Fully OA")).otherwise(col("Model")))
new_df = new_df.withColumn("APC", when(lower(col("Title")).contains("open"), lit("3000")).otherwise(col("APC")))
new_df = new_df.withColumn("APC", when(trim(lower(col("Title"))) == "jama health forum", lit("3000")).otherwise(col("APC")))

desired_columns = [
    "Publisher", "ISSN1", "ISSN2", "Title", "Source", "Model", "Model Notes",
    "APC", "Currency", "License Types", "Year", "PublisherID", "JoiningID",
    "Imprint", "Society"
]

# Reorder the columns based on desired schema
df_reordered = new_df.select([col for col in desired_columns if col in new_df.columns])
